EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} applied policy "{object.name}" to an object group on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} created policy "{object.name}" for objects on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} set a new default policy on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed policy "{object.name}" for objects on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} set policy "{object.name}" as the default policy on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} applied a policy to an object group on host {event_src.host}
